TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Wutai (霧臺鄉, Butay go) ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Butay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 224 buwan, 758 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 747 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay92%, Paywan4%, Bunun1%, Amis1%, 其binah lihuyan s'uli%. Wutai mki sku Heto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 304.67 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 244.47 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 58.03 km²), 3,314 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,058 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,247 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 98%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Rukay ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Wutai ays psgayun 6 ru 8 alang. 8 alang hani ga, Kabalelradhane , Kinulane , Adiri , Wutai , Karamemedesane , Kudrengere , Kucapungane , Labuwan . rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Wutai hya' ga Kinulane. tay 'zil na Wutai hya' ga Kudrengere. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ wutai (***, βutaj ɣo) ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βutaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, rukaj**%, pajwan*%, βunun*%, amis~ɕ*%, *βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli%. wutai mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na rukaj ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu wutai ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, kaβalelra*ħane , kinulane , a*iri , wutai , karameme*es~ɕane , ku*reŋere , kuʦ~ʨapuŋane , laβuwan . rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na wutai ħjaʔ ɣa kinulane. taj ʔzil na wutai ħjaʔ ɣa ku*reŋere. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Wutai (霧臺鄉, Butay go) ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Butay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 224 buwan, 758 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 747 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay92%, Paywan4%, Bunun1%, Amis1%, 其binah lihuyan s'uli%. Wutai mki sku Heto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 304.67 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 244.47 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 58.03 km²), 3,314 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,058 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,247 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 98%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Rukay ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Wutai ays psgayun 6 ru 8 alang. 8 alang hani ga, Kabalelradhane , Kinulane , Adiri , Wutai , Karamemedesane , Kudrengere , Kucapungane , Labuwan . rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Wutai hya' ga Kinulane. tay 'zil na Wutai hya' ga Kudrengere. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ wutai (***, βutaj ɣo) ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βutaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, rukaj**%, pajwan*%, βunun*%, amis~ɕ*%, *βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli%. wutai mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na rukaj ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu wutai ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, kaβalelra*ħane , kinulane , a*iri , wutai , karameme*es~ɕane , ku*reŋere , kuʦ~ʨapuŋane , laβuwan . rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na wutai ħjaʔ ɣa kinulane. taj ʔzil na wutai ħjaʔ ɣa ku*reŋere. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
